response.justification: The candidate has extensive software development experience, but it is primarily focused on web, mobile, and high-level backend domains. They lack the core requirements for this embedded firmware role, most notably the mandatory native-level Japanese proficiency, strong C programming for UNIX, Linux kernel modification experience, and domain knowledge in L2/L3 networking and embedded security.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience across multiple domains and full-stack technologies.
Strong background in Linux environments, DevOps (Docker, CI/CD), and microservices architecture.
Demonstrated engineering craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory native-level Japanese language proficiency required for the position.
No demonstrated experience in embedded networking, L2/L3 protocols, or LAN-switch security technologies.
Insufficient recent experience with C programming for UNIX and Linux kernel source-code modification.
